review.title: A beautiful discovery
review.text: We stayed at La Fiancée du Pirate from March 27 to 31, 2025, with family and friends for our daughter's wedding. You discover this hotel by walking down a few steps; the very bright reception and dining area open onto a terrace looking out to Cap Ferrat and the sea. The rooms on the reception level, as well as those on levels -1 and -2, are spacious, bright, comfortable, and very clean. The lovely view is equally appreciated during the delicious buffet breakfasts. We loved the warm welcome and availability of Charlotte and Fabrice, who put so much energy into making our stay warm and pleasant, paying attention to everyone's well-being (including our 9-month-old granddaughter). Thanks again for everything, Charlotte!!
